steps.title: Make a statement
steps.content: The blank follows "Interestingly," and is followed by another factual sentence. The blank should therefore be a complete declarative sentence, not a direct question.

steps.title: Match word order and punctuation
steps.content: Choice A has statement word order but ends with a question mark. Choice C uses question word order but ends with a period. Choice D makes the same mismatch with a negative question form. The answer is B.
